name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log) in your specs dir. v2.1 added phase-0 context-recall (codemap recall before clarification). v3.0 adds **specode-distill** sub-skill (`/specode:specode-distill <slug>`) — distills a single spec's knowledge into the spec's own project_root (`.ai-memory/knowledge/{rules,business,modules,cases,pitfalls}/*.yml` + `knowledge-base/*.md` twin), and acceptance phase ends with an AskUserQuestion prompt to trigger it. Strictly per-spec (each spec writes to its own project; no cross-project mixing).
